channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Russia accused of killing Navalny with dart frog toxin. What we know about the rare poison
item.description: European allies' findings that Putin critic Alexei Navalny was killed with a rare toxin from poison dart frogs is "troubling," said Secretary of State...

item.title: Kennedy says FDA "will act on" ultra-processed foods petition, but indicates no new rules
item.description: The Trump administration will respond to a citizen petition calling for a regulatory overhaul of ultra-processed foods , Health and Human Services Sec...

item.title: Integrity faces a critical moment of peril
item.description: Prediction markets are creating a digital Wild West, where well-placed opportunists can win big by betting on real-world events — from the capture of ...

item.title: The race to succeed McConnell showcases how the GOP has soured on him
item.description: Three GOP candidates, all former McConnell interns, are keeping their distance as they seek to align with President Donald Trump.

item.title: Moore's bitter Maryland fights threaten '28 hopes
item.description: Maryland Gov. Wes Moore 's national star is on the rise, but his relationships with fellow Democrats in his backyard are fraying. Why it matters: Moor...

item.title: Pelosi's new campaign: Boost Newsom for 2028
item.description: Nancy Pelosi is retiring from Congress, but she has more campaigns in mind. Among them: Boost Gavin Newsom as a potential contender for the White Hous...

item.title: Trump claims victory on affordability as public anxieties persist
item.description: Advisers had been encouraging the president to sound more empathetic toward struggling Americans. But as some bright spots emerge, the messaging has s...

item.title: Six congressional primaries that explain where the country is headed
item.description: A 21st-century-record number of seats are opening, and races will be raucous and crowded, reflecting both parties’ ideological, stylistic and generati...

item.title: Golfers sue Trump administration over public course takeover in D.C.
item.description: Some area golfers say the president’s ambitions for East Potomac Golf Links could put low-cost entry points to the game out of reach.

item.title: Rubio says U.S., Europe ‘belong together,’ despite rifts over Trump policies
item.description: While some saw the remarks as reassuring, key European leaders renewed calls for more independence from the U.S. amid tensions over issues like Greenl...

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
